data.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — All 4 integration points updated in validate.sh: (1) LAUNCHED_CHECKS conditionally adds shim-refs when script exists, (2) run_check for shim-refs guarded by file existence, (3) report_check for shim-refs guarded by file existence, (4) tally_check for shim-refs guarded by file existence.
